whyPinned: This pin is the current deterministic base for morpho-verity's post-#1939 Solidity-fidelity work. It keeps the bridge surface already consumed by the repo and adds the Verity ECM modules Morpho now uses directly, including static ABI Keccak helpers, EIP-712 digest hashing, Solmate ERC20 transfer wrappers, callback and bubbling low-level-call support, typed one-word oracle reads, and Solidity-0.8 checked arithmetic helpers.

remainingDivergences.summary: Morpho now keeps the canonical Verity contract in Morpho/Contract.lean, while MacroSlice remains as a compatibility alias and Generated.lean remains the repo-local compiler boundary.
Semantic-bridge proofs still rely on repo-local MorphoState-to-ContractState encoders and wrapper theorems around the upstream contract semantics surface.
